questions.question: Choose the correct time preposition: The meeting starts {a1} nine.
Choose the place preposition: I waited {a1} the bus stop.
Choose the movement preposition: She walked {a1} the room.
Choose the preposition with a starting point: We have lived here {a1} 2020.
Choose the deadline preposition: Please finish the report {a1} Friday.
Choose the preposition before a noun phrase: I slept {a1} the flight.
Choose the dependent preposition: We depend {a1} reliable data.
Choose the adjective pattern: She is interested {a1} music.
Choose the noun pattern: There is no reason {a1} panic.
Avoid literal translation: Listen {a1} the teacher carefully.
Avoid an unnecessary preposition: We discussed {a1} the problem yesterday.
Avoid a missing dependent preposition: I am waiting {a1} your answer.
